name: Bonze Alone
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>独</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひとり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>法</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>師</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot be Normal or Special Summoned if you control a monster. You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) in Attack Position. If another monster(s) is Summoned to your field while you control this monster: Destroy this card.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal or Special Summoned if you control a monster. You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) in Attack Position. If another monster(s) is Summoned to your field while you control this monster: Destroy this card.
eff: Cannot be Normal or Special Summoned if you control a monster. You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) in Attack Position. If another monster(s) is Summoned to your field while you control this monster: Destroy this card.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
